## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Connect to device via BLE
2. Send command '...'
3. Observe error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Hardware: [e.g., ESP32-WROOM-32]
- ESP-IDF Version: [e.g., v5.2.1]
- Mobile App: [e.g., nRF Connect]
- Firmware Version: [e.g., 1.0.0]

Paste relevant serial output here
